funds.name: Seedcamp
funds.description: Seedcamp is a European investment firm and seed fund founded by Reshma Sohoni and Saul Klein in 2007.

funds.description: Bessemer Venture Partners is a  venture capital firm that invests in consumer, enterprise and healthcare companies. It was founded in 1911 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.

funds.name: Sequoia Capital
funds.description: Sequoia Capital is a venture capital firm that has invested in companies like Google, Apple, Cisco, YouTube, AirBnB, and WhatsApp. The firm was founded in 1972 by Donald Valentine, and companies backed by Sequoia have created over $3.3 trillion dollars in market capitalization.
